name: Dark Tide
bio:
Balor Demon Protector of the Demon Faction, endowed with the mission of protecting her clan since childhood. She is a solid barrier of the Demon Faction.

Role: Physical Burst
Specialty: A front-midline Breakthrough-type hero that can deal massive damage to front-midline enemies and apply Curse and Bleed effects; can also extend enemy skill cooldowns.

skillSlots.name: Cursed Fang
skillSlots.description: Deal Physical Damage equal to 150% ATK + 8% of self's Max HP to the 3 enemies with the highest Critical Strike Chance; 40% chance to apply 1 stack of [Seal].

skillSlots.name: Dark Lord Blade
skillSlots.description: Attack the enemy with the highest Critical Strike Chance, dealing Physical Damage equal to 400% ATK + 15% of self's Max HP, and apply 1 stack of [Seal]; then steal 20% of the target's Critical Strike Chance for 2 turns.

effects.name: Invitation of Demonic Realm
effects.description: Gain [Grim Reaper's Power] when self's HP first drops below 60%.

effects.name: Invitation of Demonic Realm
effects.description: [Demonlord's Blade] heals self for 40% of DMG dealt.

effects.name: Invitation of Demonic Realm
effects.description: [Reaper's Power] additionally increases Final DMG RED by 20%.

effects.name: Invitation of Demonic Realm
effects.description: [Demonlord's Blade] Cooldown -2 turns when any Character dies.
